requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — SLSB / EWRC / Donor Procurement Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——SLSB / EWRC / 捐助方采购要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——SLSB / EWRC / 捐助方採購要求

summary.en: Sierra Leone's EMC regulatory framework for PV inverters is based on IEC standards adopted or being adopted by SLSB. IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) is the dedicated EMC standard for PV inverters and is referenced in IEC-aligned project procurement specifications applied in Sierra Leone. IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to and including 16 A per phase) is also referenced in IEC-aligned grid-connection and project procurement conditions. In practice, EMC requirements for Sierra Leone PV projects are embedded in: (a) EWRC licensing conditions for grid-tied projects; (b) donor/lender procurement specifications (World Bank, AfDB, FCDO, UNOPS), which specify IEC EMC test evidence for equipment; (c) project-level engineering specifications set by EPCs and project owners. No standalone Sierra Leone domestic EMC Technical Regulation specifically targeting PV inverters has been confirmed as of the access date.
summary.zh: 塞拉利昂光伏逆变器的EMC监管框架基于SLSB已采纳或正在采纳的IEC标准。IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）是光伏逆变器的专用EMC标准，在塞拉利昂适用的IEC对应项目采购规格中被引用。IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备的谐波电流排放限值）也在IEC对应并网和项目采购条件中被引用。在实践中，塞拉利昂光伏项目的EMC要求包含在：（a）并网项目的EWRC许可条件；（b）捐助方/贷款方采购规格（世界银行、非洲开发银行、FCDO、UNOPS），规定设备须提供IEC EMC测试证据；（c）EPC承包商和项目业主设定的项目级工程规格。截至访问日期，尚未确认存在专门针对光伏逆变器的独立塞拉利昂国内EMC技术法规。
summary.zht: 獅子山光伏逆變器的EMC監管框架基於SLSB已採納或正在採納的IEC標準。IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）是光伏逆變器的專用EMC標準，在獅子山適用的IEC對應項目採購規格中被引用。IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備的諧波電流排放限值）也在IEC對應併網和項目採購條件中被引用。在實踐中，獅子山光伏項目的EMC要求包含在：（a）併網項目的EWRC許可條件；（b）捐助方/貸款方採購規格（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、FCDO、UNOPS），規定設備須提供IEC EMC測試證據；（c）EPC承包商和項目業主設定的項目級工程規格。截至訪問日期，尚未確認存在專門針對光伏逆變器的獨立獅子山國內EMC技術法規。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (IEC standard referenced in Sierra Leone project procurement and EWRC-aligned specifications)

IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) (referenced in IEC-aligned grid-connection and donor procurement conditions)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements within China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods that conceptually overlap with Chinese domestic EMC standards, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as required by SLSB, EWRC, or donor/lender procurement frameworks in Sierra Leone. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Sierra Leone project submissions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，包含中国国内框架下的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了与中国国内EMC标准在概念上重叠的IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与塞拉利昂SLSB、EWRC或捐助方/贷款方采购框架所要求的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调。仅基于GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被接受为塞拉利昂项目提交中IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2的合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，包含中國國內框架下的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了與中國國內EMC標準在概念上重疊的IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與獅子山SLSB、EWRC或捐助方/貸款方採購框架所要求的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調。僅基於GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被接受為獅子山項目提交中IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2的合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements under China's domestic framework

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements as applied in Sierra Leone EWRC, SLSB, and donor/lender project procurement contexts. Exporters must obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model or family being supplied; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report. These reports should cover the power rating and configuration supplied to the Sierra Leone project. Note that Sierra Leone's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid differs from China's 220/380 V baseline — if EMC tests were obtained under Chinese grid voltage conditions, confirm with the project engineer whether retesting under 230/400 V conditions is required. Also note that inverters operating in Sierra Leone's high-humidity and Harmattan-dust environment should have EMC enclosure and filtering performance documented for tropical conditions.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足塞拉利昂EWRC、SLSB及捐助方/贷款方项目采购背景下适用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商须取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖所供应特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。上述报告应涵盖供应至塞拉利昂项目的功率等级和配置。注意塞拉利昂230/400 V、50 Hz电网与中国220/380 V基准不同——若EMC测试在中国电网电压条件下取得，须与项目工程师确认是否需要在230/400 V条件下重新测试。此外，在塞拉利昂高湿度和哈马丹沙尘环境中运行的逆变器，其EMC外壳和滤波性能应记录热带条件下的适用性。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足獅子山EWRC、SLSB及捐助方/貸款方項目採購背景下適用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商須取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋所供應特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。上述報告應涵蓋供應至獅子山項目的功率等級和配置。注意獅子山230/400 V、50 Hz電網與中國220/380 V基準不同——若EMC測試在中國電網電壓條件下取得，須與項目工程師確認是否需要在230/400 V條件下重新測試。此外，在獅子山高濕度和哈馬丹沙塵環境中運行的逆變器，其EMC外殼和濾波性能應記錄熱帶條件下的適用性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for EWRC-licensed grid-tied project equipment submissions and donor/lender-funded project procurement qualifying under IEC-referenced specifications; SLSB EMC mandatory scheme coverage for PV inverters should be verified directly with SLSB
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is required for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

source.publisher: Sierra Leone Standards Bureau (SLSB); IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 published by IEC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements as applied in Sierra Leone by SLSB, EWRC, and donor/lender procurement frameworks. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before project equipment qualification in Sierra Leone. Confirm whether Sierra Leone's 230/400 V grid conditions require retesting compared to any existing test results obtained under 220/380 V Chinese grid conditions. Include tropical environment (humidity, coastal salt-air, Harmattan dust) EMC performance documentation in the equipment technical dossier. Verify SLSB mandatory conformity scheme coverage for PV inverters directly with SLSB before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足SLSB、EWRC和捐助方/贷款方采购框架在塞拉利昂适用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在塞拉利昂项目设备资格认定前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请确认塞拉利昂230/400 V电网条件是否需要相较于在中国220/380 V电网条件下取得的现有测试结果重新测试。设备技术文件中应包含热带环境（湿度、沿海盐雾、哈马丹沙尘）EMC性能文件。在装运前请直接向SLSB核实光伏逆变器的SLSB强制性合格评定计划覆盖范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足SLSB、EWRC和捐助方/貸款方採購框架在獅子山適用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在獅子山項目設備資格認定前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請確認獅子山230/400 V電網條件是否需要相較於在中國220/380 V電網條件下取得的現有測試結果重新測試。設備技術文件中應包含熱帶環境（濕度、沿海鹽霧、哈馬丹沙塵）EMC性能文件。在裝運前請直接向SLSB核實光伏逆變器的SLSB強制性合格評定計畫覆蓋範圍。
